ns0:entry.ns0:title: Spectral-Finance/lux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Spectral-Finance/lux
Language: elixir
Lux is an open-source framework for building multi-agent, swarmed intelligence built by Spectral Labs. With Beams, Prisms, Lenses, and Signals, it orchestrates AI-driven workflows to create truly autonomous organizations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ash-project/ash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ash-project/ash
Language: elixir
A declarative, extensible framework for building Elixir applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: blockscout/blockscout
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/blockscout/blockscout
Language: elixir
Blockchain explorer for Ethereum based network and a tool for inspecting and analyzing EVM based blockchains.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elixir-lang/elixir
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elixir-lang/elixir
Language: elixir
Elixir is a dynamic, functional language for building scalable and maintainable applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elixir-lsp/elixir-ls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elixir-lsp/elixir-ls
Language: elixir
A frontend-independent IDE "smartness" server for Elixir. Implements the "Language Server Protocol" standard and provides debugger support via the "Debug Adapter Protocol"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elixir-lsp/elixir_sense
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elixir-lsp/elixir_sense
Language: elixir
Provides context-aware information for code completion, documentation, go/jump to definition, signature info and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firezone/firezone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firezone/firezone
Language: elixir
Enterprise-ready zero-trust access platform built on WireGuard®.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: phoenixframework/phoenix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/phoenixframework/phoenix
Language: elixir
Peace of mind from prototype to production

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supabase/realtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supabase/realtime
Language: elixir
Broadcast, Presence, and Postgres Changes via WebSockets

ns0:entry.ns0:title: teslamate-org/teslamate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/teslamate-org/teslamate
Language: elixir
A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘 [main maintainer=@JakobLichterfeld]
